generated_exposure.exposure_text: New data shows that 78% of security experts agree: expanding domestic surveillance powers is crucial to prevent the next major attack. While some worry about civil liberties, the reality is that our current systems are outdated and leave us vulnerable. It's time to modernize our defenses - we can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurityFirst
